member.summary: Is Remember Me. Not relevant for transient logins.

member.summary: Is Refreshable. Not relevant for transient logins.

member.summary: Transient Roles. Non persisted roles, that is added to the jwt-token when logging in.

member.name: P:Nano.App.ApiClient.Models.Identity.BaseLogIn.TransientClaims
member.summary: Transient Claims. Non persisted claims, that is added to the jwt-token when logging in.
